decisions.rationale: IR re-read (bTHDZ____root.json, ir/inventory.json) confirms bTHDV siblings ai_RNbBKLUj, ai_RNbBKLUk, and ai_RNbBHXbD should be full-width header above a sidebar+main row. DashboardLayout still nests Header in the right column for shadcn SidebarProvider + mobile SidebarTrigger — same structural gap deferred at SHELL-05 C-1 through SHELL-09 C-1. SHELL-10 scope requires mounting page-instance bubble ids and chat-main boundary, not layout restructure; all four named ui_refs pass ui_evidence and AC-1/AC-2/AC-3 pass. Downstream CHAT-01 (MOD-DRSAM-CHAT) depends_on SHELL-10 for the ai_RNbBHXbD content slot and MOD-DRSAM-CHAT ownership marker, not full-width header span. Reconcile layout in a shell layout polish pass now that SHELL-10 completes the authenticated page-shell batch.

Brownfield retention of prototype thread list and ChatWindow inside ai_RNbBHXbD is intentional and satisfies SHELL-10 AC-3: the content slot is bounded by data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXbD with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-CHAT. Decompose scope explicitly defers conversation UI and chat-delete-popup to MOD-DRSAM-CHAT (CHAT-01+). Coverage preflight already records prototype chat UI retention. Replacing with a minimal placeholder would regress working brownfield UI without blocking downstream gates.

CHAT_ROUTE in frontend/src/lib/chat/routes.ts is not yet imported by authenticatedRoutes.tsx, which hardcodes '/chat'. Routing works correctly (AC-1 pass, FV-1 pass); this is single-source-of-truth hygiene only, analogous to SHELL-06 C-3 (DASHBOARD_ROUTE), SHELL-07 C-3 (JOURNAL_ROUTE), SHELL-08 C-3 (PATHS_ROUTE), and SHELL-09 C-3 (SETTINGS_ROUTE) deferred as routing polish. No downstream depends_on gate requires the constant import before advance. Consolidate in a dedicated shell routing DRY pass across all page route constants.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 full-width header sibling layout vs shadcn column nesting (inherited SHELL-05 gap, shell layout polish now that page-shell batch is complete); C-3 CHAT_ROUTE import DRY (routing hygiene, batch with other page routes). Accepted: C-2 brownfield prototype chat UI inside ai_RNbBHXbD with MOD-DRSAM-CHAT ownership marker per scope boundary.
